ddt:Target.Name: LPN V1.7
ddt:Target.Description:
LPN
V0.1 10 aout 2005, Création V0.2 10 mars 2006, cohérence B2 V0.3 10 avril 2006, cohérence B3 V0.4 17 mai 2006, cohérence B4 V0.5 12 juin 2006, SLOT V0.6 22 juin 2006, cohérence BDV2 V0.7 7 août 2006, cohérence BDV3 V0.8 5 septembre 2006, cohérence C1, adressage radio V0.9 13 septembre 2006, corrections V1.0 28 septembre 2006, cohérence C3, paramètres acoustique V1.1 8 janvier 2007, cohérence C4, paramètres acoustiques V1.2 31 janvier 2007, cohérence C5: RSSI, antennas test, traceability V1.3 13 mars 2007, cohérence C7: paramètres téléphone, black level, acoustic V1.4 28 juin 2007: correction réponse attendue trames acoustiques + corrections mineures V1.5 17 juillet 2007: correction du test HP, correction status DTC amplis d'antennes V1.6 27 juillet 2007: tone freq correction, ajout des écrans, ajout version C10 V1.7 9 janvier 2008: correction lecture traçabilité, ajout applicabilité X81, X84, X85, X61
Lionel PELLETIER SII Plateau intégration e/e tél: 01768 54035 lionel.pelletier-renexter@renault.com

Data.Name: SDS: type of diagnostic session (R)
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Data.Name: ECUR: reset type (R)
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: ECUR: reset type (S)
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: RDBLID: Record local ID
Data.Comment: identifies a predifined group of data tobe returned to the tool

Data.Name: RDBLID: CANMMUX: Ref Messagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: LID: VIN: V.I.N.
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID: VIN: C.R.C.
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Data.Name: IOControl:TestCard
Data.Comment: type of test to be proceeded

Item.Text: color bars test card in progress
white screen test card in proress

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_DSAR: frame number
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: frame number

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_DSAR: data
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: data

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_DSAR: checksum
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: checksum

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_CCAR: data
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: data

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_CSAR: data
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: data

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_CCAR: checksum
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: checksum

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_CSAR: checksum
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: checksum

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_CCAR: frame number
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: frame number

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_CSAR: frame number
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: frame number

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_AR: car body
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration all frames: car body

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_AR: car type
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration all frames: car type

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_AR: roof type
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration all frames: roof type

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_AR: seats cover
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration all frame: seats cover

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_AR: side
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration all frames: driver side

Data.Name: RWDBI:CNF_AR: version
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration all frames: version

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RDBI:FM/AM":FieldMax
Data.Comment: maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: StoredAMFMFieldStrength.AM:Min
Data.Comment: minimum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: StoredAMFMFieldStrength.AM:Mean
Data.Comment: average value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: StoredAMFMFieldStrength.AM:Max
Data.Comment: maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: StoredFM2FieldStrength.FM:Min
Data.Comment: minimum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: StoredFM2FieldStrength.FM:Mean
Data.Comment: average value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: StoredFM2FieldStrength.FM:Max
Data.Comment: maximum value since start of the ECU

Data.Name: AcousticRestitutionfirstFrame
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: data

Data.Name: AcousticRestitutionSecondFrame
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: data

Data.Name: AcousticRestitutionThirdFrame
Data.Comment: Acoustic restitution configuration first frame: data

Data.Name: CDchangerNumCD
Data.Comment: number of CD inserted in CD changer

Data.Name: ECUconfiguration
Data.Comment: config ECU: SWRC, antenna supply, CD changer

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.CDchangerAllCDeject
Request.Comment: Eject all cd from CD changer

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.Availibility
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartAfterSalesSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Test.Description: configuration incomplète ou non prise en compte

Label.Text: Lecture config X95 et autres véhicules LPN2 hors X91
Ecriture config X95 et autres véhicules LPN2 hors X91
Boutons du changeur de CD en façade
Boutons de la façade de la LPN
